name: Sarukhstart Takeover
short_description: Sarukhstart Takeover is a mascot horror indie game inspired by Baldi's Basics in Education and Learning.
detailed_description:
Sarukhstart Takeover is a mascot horror indie game inspired by Baldi's Basics in Education and Learning.

from A to Z, you'll learn a lot! Meet Sarukh, Creator of Sarukhstart.

and his big sister, T4H1- DON'T BUY THIS GAME!! It's unfinished so it'll be different! Once you anger her, It's irreversible. Trust Me, If you end up playing this Avoid her no matter what. use my Iced Tea to shoot her away. AND MOST 1MP0RT4N-

Collect all 26 Letters and Give it to Sarukh. but it won't be easy!
Because Tahid is coming for you.
This game doesn't just teach the letters, it also teaches F U N !
